transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I need to reschedule. My child's sick so I can't come today.
AGENT: I'm sorry to hear that. Hope your child gets better soon. Can I have your name?
CALLER: Tanya Bapat. My appointment was at 12:30 today with the physiotherapist.
AGENT: Yes, 12:30 PM with Mr. Ganesh Khot. Would you like to move it to tomorrow or later this week?
CALLER: Uh, maybe day after? Same time if possible.
AGENT: 12:30 PM the day after tomorrow is open. Done — rescheduled for Tanya Bapat. You'll get a message. Take care!
CALLER: Thank you, appreciate it.
